title: The Tortoise and the Eagle
lines: A Tortoise, crawling along the ground, looked up at an Eagle soaring through the sky.
"If only I could reach the heights you reach."
An Eagle offered to carry him aloft.
The Tortoise was delighted, and grasping the Eagle's talon, he was lifted high into the sky.
But the Eagle, tired of carrying the heavy load, let him fall.
The poor Tortoise fell to the ground and was killed.
"I was wrong to leave my own sphere," he thought as he fell.
moral: Stay true to your own nature.
